title: Create a Product Pitch for a Sustainable Fashion Brand
scenario: Develop a 1-minute product pitch for a sustainable fashion brand that showcases the brand's commitment to eco-friendliness and high-quality materials. The pitch should highlight the brand's unique selling proposition, target audience, and key features of the product. The pitch should be concise, enthusiastic, and include a clear call-to-action.
constraints: Must emphasize the brand's sustainability efforts
Should include a statistic or metric related to the product's environmental impact

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the given constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the pitch, ensuring it is enthusiastic and engaging.
Verify that the pitch highlights the brand's unique selling proposition.
Check if the pitch includes a clear call-to-action.
